what_was_built: reports/arbitrage_qa_harness_spec_v1/qa_harness_spec.md (human-readable: 5 per-category QA checks + 8 QA check groups + 6-status QA model + 23-field future QA report schema + PASS/WATCH/FAIL + safety boundaries + no-profit-claim policy)
tests/test_arbitrage_qa_harness_spec.py (22 tests covering schema + safety + integration)
tools/strategy_candidate_registry.py: extra_files extended with the new QA harness docs (lane stays IDEA)
what_the_qa_harness_spec_defines: Required inputs: frozen on-disk dataset, per-dataset manifest, pinned data-contract + research-protocol versions, pre-declared QA configuration
Forbidden inputs: live exchange APIs, scraping, embedded keys, network URLs in source_location, missing-manifest datasets, manifests that fail dataset-manifest validation, peeked OOS
8 QA check groups: A_manifest_integrity, B_timestamp_and_synchronization, C_quote_and_spread, D_order_book_and_depth, E_trade_print, F_fee_funding_cost, G_liquidity_and_latency, H_anomaly_detection
Per-category QA checks for all 5 Arbitrage Research Protocol v1 categories
6-status QA model: QA_DRAFT, QA_PASS, QA_WARN, QA_FAIL, QA_BLOCKED, QA_RETIRED with exact semantics
23-field future QA report schema (qa_report_id ... safety_flags) with safety_flags pinned False in every report
PASS/WATCH/FAIL rules + safety boundaries + no-profit-claim policy
hard_rules: QA_PASS does NOT authorize paper or live trading.
QA_WARN requires explicit operator-acceptance memo before any research use.

tests_run.command: python -m pytest tests/test_arbitrage_qa_harness_spec.py tests/test_arbitrage_dataset_manifest.py tests/test_arbitrage_data_contract.py tests/test_arbitrage_research_protocol.py tests/test_strategy_candidate_registry.py tests/test_strategy_next_bundle.py --rootdir=tests -q

guardrails_held: lane is not promoted to ACTIVE just because additional docs exist
lane never reaches STRONG evidence in the auto-build path

next_bundle_generator_selection_after_up.title: Arbitrage research protocol
next_bundle_generator_selection_after_up.note: Deterministic logic NOT artificially modified. The queue at HEAD does not yet include a Data Source Evaluation Memo or Sample Dataset Plan item; existing protocol/data-first scoring axes still rank arbitrage at the top. Operator should consult report.md `recommended_next_bundle` for the actual Bundle 8 choice.

how_it_fits_after_dataset_manifest_v1: Arbitrage Research Protocol v1 (30dabc4) -> Arbitrage Data Contract v1 (c4d4c8b) -> Arbitrage Dataset Manifest v1 (492fcc1) -> Arbitrage QA Harness Spec v1 (this bundle).

Together these four documents define WHAT arbitrage is, WHAT data is needed, HOW each dataset is declared/frozen, and HOW each dataset is QA'd, ALL BEFORE any data has been pulled or any test has been run.
Subsequent bundles (Data Source Evaluation Memo, Sample Dataset Plan v1, P2 data acquisition, harness implementation, P3 offline replay, ...) are each separately authorized.
recommended_next_bundle: Arbitrage Data Source Evaluation Memo (written assessment of which offline data sources could later satisfy Categories A-E; memo only, no data pull)
Arbitrage Sample Dataset Plan v1 (pre-acquisition plan for a small first dataset; plan only, no fetch)
Crypto-D1 Protocol Memo (alternative lane, currently PARKED; would require a new hypothesis, not a re-tune)
